body.notes: Participation in IETF meetings constitutes agreement to the Note Well, which permits recording, transcription, and public archival of proceedings. See also BCP 78 (RFC 5378) and BCP 79 (RFC 8179) for IPR policies.

body.title: 2.1-BGP Flow Specification for DetNet Flow Mapping
2.3-The extensions of BGP-LS to carry security capabilities
1.3-BGP Colorful Prefix Routing (CPR) for SRv6 based Services
1.9-BGP Dissemination of FlowSpec for Transport Aware Mobility
1.11-BGP Extensions of SR Policy for Segment List Protection
1.12-Advertisement of Segment Routing Policies using BGP Link-State
1.15-MP-BGP Extension and the Procedures for IPv4/IPv6 Mapping Advertisement
1.16-Connecting IPv4 Islands over IPv6 Core using IPv4 Provider Edge Routers (4PE)
